creator: jschoch@siscom.net
text:
KDE is installing improperly. GUI does not come up with "startkde". v4.0 installed reasonably well on the same machine. A partial KDE GUI comes up with "startx". Just wanted to know if this is a known bug that will be fixed in v4.2 possibly using KDE 2.0. Defaults used for installation. This may be listed on your cite but after a couple of hours of looking I gave up.
Jim Schoch

Fix: 

I can wait until v4.2 comes out!
How-To-Repeat: Use the same default installation.
